vocab.example: There has been a profound shift in the pedagogical approach, moving away from rote learning toward student-centered inquiry.

vocab.meaning: phòng thí nghiệm hiện đại bậc nhất
vocab.example: The crumbling old science block has been replaced by a state-of-the-art laboratory equipped with advanced robotics.

vocab.meaning: sự tích hợp kỹ thuật số
vocab.example: The most noticeable change is the seamless digital integration into every lesson, with interactive whiteboards in every room.

vocab.meaning: sự phát triển toàn diện (thể chất, tinh thần, trí tuệ)
vocab.example: Modern schools now place a much greater emphasis on holistic development rather than just academic grades.

vocab.meaning: sự cung cấp các hoạt động ngoại khóa
vocab.example: The extracurricular provision has expanded vastly, offering everything from coding and debate to sustainable gardening.

vocab.meaning: các sáng kiến xanh/vì môi trường
vocab.example: My old school has adopted several green initiatives, such as solar panels and a comprehensive recycling program.

vocab.meaning: sự chăm sóc đời sống tinh thần/tâm lý học sinh
vocab.example: Compared to my time, there is now a far more sophisticated system of pastoral care to support students' mental wellbeing.

vocab.meaning: trung tâm/không gian sinh hoạt chung
vocab.example: The newly built library serves as a communal hub where students from different grades can collaborate on projects.

vocab.meaning: môi trường hòa nhập/không phân biệt
vocab.example: The school has worked hard to create an inclusive environment that celebrates cultural diversity and supports special needs.

vocab.meaning: sự mở rộng về mặt kiến trúc/xây dựng
vocab.example: The school has seen significant architectural expansion, with several new wings added to accommodate the growing student body.
